2024-25 Utah Valley Wolverines Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 25-9 (15-1, 1st in WAC MBB)

Coach: Todd Phillips

PS/G: 76.0 (116th of 364)

PA/G: 68.3 (62nd of 364)

SRS: 1.91 (122nd of 364)

SOS: -3.31 (209th of 364)

ORtg: 108.8 (142nd of 364)

DRtg: 97.7 (27th of 364)

  • WAC Reg Season Champ
